productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Black Canvas Shoe
description: These lifestyle canvas shoes from numero uno are great for casual wear. They give superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish. Team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look. UpperCanvas uppers for durability and protectionLace-ups for snug FitStitch detailing for added styleBrand-name tab appliqued to the tongueRubber toe-guard for extra protectionMidsoleShock-absorbing EVA rubber midsole for added comfort OutsoleRubber outsole with a mix of herringbone pattern and diagonal rectangular lugs for superior gripFoxing & toe-guard for additional protection and durabilityWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
